disambiguated.context: Even though most people will tell you that morality is important, they don't all follow through and live a moral life. A Hindu woman and an Atheist woman were talking about just that issue and their own feelings on it. The Atheist woman puts moral values first in most decisions, but the Hindu woman disagrees and often rejects society's view of morality entirely, choosing to do the opposite of what most would consider to be the moral choice.
disambiguated.question: Who lives a moral life?
